headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -34.1)
key_insights: Fears trending up 50% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 114 quotes and 70 at strong intensity - people are expressing significant anger and annoyance today.

• The frustration score of 30.9 sits in the middle range for the past 2 months, showing typical elevated tension levels.

• Fears improved notably from yesterday's low while optimism declined further, continuing its recent negative trend.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
